query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'app_users';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1j7ZhzGuhaFGuS6.root --database BkuyPoD4AgGm8RhSHRpVMT --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'app_users';
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
name	varchar
email	varchar
passwordHash	varchar
role	enum
status	enum
approvedBy	int
approvedAt	timestamp
createdAt	timestamp
updatedAt	timestamp
